page_content:
LATN605 Vergil (3 Credits)

A study of Vergil’s development as a literary artist and Augustan poet through readings in the Eclogues, Georgics, and Aeneid. Readings are in Latin.

LATN623 The Augustan Age (3 Credits) Analysis of the major literary figures and genres in prose and poetry of the period from 43 BC to AD 14.
